title: stachys floridana
intro: Stachys floridana, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate headaches, fever, and digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Stachys floridana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal purposes.
